prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 3667→4655→5760→8019→2663 名。2021–2024 年呈逐年后移趋势（从 3667 后移至 8019），但 2025 年大幅前跃至 2663 名，创近五年最佳，存在明显的"大小年"波动特征；该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021 年 52 人、2022 年 52 人、2023 年 55 人、2024 年 60 人、2025 年 65 人，持续小幅扩招；但 2026 年计划骤降至 25 人（缩招约 61.5%），名额大幅减少将显著加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜 2026 年排名第 12 位（Top20），属顶尖工科院校；威海校区与本部共享学科资源与声誉；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第 10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024 年曾出现投档线暴跌信号，但 2025 年已强势回升；哈工大拥有 17 个 A- 及以上学科：机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、力学 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、软件工程 A、控制科学与工程 A、电气工程 A 等，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、自动化等工科大类持续高热，与哈工大优势学科高度匹配；福建省物理类考生数从 2021 年 11.7 万持续增长至 2025 年 19.2 万，2026 年估算约 20.4 万（+6%），考生规模扩大推高竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前跃后的回调压力、2026 年招生计划骤降 61.5% 导致竞争急剧加剧、福建省物理类考生持续增长、学校高声誉与高热度的叠加效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次将较 2025 年明显后移。预测最低位次约 1730 名，区间 1522–1938 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（卓越优才计划）（理工卓越优才计划）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（卓越优才计划）（智能制造卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在 1522–1938 名区间内，建议位次在 1700 名以内的考生以二档为主力、一档冲刺；位次在 1900 名附近的考生以三档保底为主。一档拔尖班竞争激烈，适合位次明显优于区间上限的考生重点冲击。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3667→4655→5760→8019→2663. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving backward year by year (from 3667 to 8019), but in 2025, it jumped significantly forward to 2663, the best in the past five years, showing obvious "big and small year" fluctuation characteristics; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province Physics Category: 52 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 65 in 2025, with continuous small expansion; but the 2026 plan sharply drops to 25 (a reduction of about 61.5%), and the significant reduction in slots will markedly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (Top 20), belonging to top-tier engineering institutions; the Weihai campus shares disciplinary resources and reputation with the main campus; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, reflecting relatively high application attention; in 2024, there was a signal of a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but it has strongly rebounded in 2025; HIT has 17 A- and above disciplines: Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc., with top engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering categories such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Automation continue to be highly popular, highly matching HIT's advantageous disciplines; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province has grown continuously from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, estimated at about 204,000 in 2026 (+6%), and the expansion of the candidate pool increases competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the correction pressure after the significant forward jump in 2025 rankings, the sharp 61.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan leading to drastically intensified competition, the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the superimposed effect of the university's high reputation and high popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1730, with a range of 1522–1938.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Program) (Science and Engineering Excellent Talent Program)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Program) (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 1522–1938, it is recommended that candidates with rankings within 1700 mainly target Tier 2 as the main force and Tier 1 as a sprint; candidates with rankings around 1900 mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net. The Tier 1 top classes are highly competitive, suitable for candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range to focus on attacking.
